_comment: Single source of truth for the 16 cyber-range VMs (10 base + 4 M7 + 2 M8/M9). Read by vms.tf (jsondecode, for the COW volume resources) and by scripts/define-domains.py (for libvirt domain XML generation). IPs: DCs .10, app servers .20+, workstations .100+, .50-.99 reserved for BadBlood-noise hosts. M7 adds the alpha (10.40.0/24) segment + c2.oscar (10.30.0.30, dual-homed into alpha). M8/M9 add dc1.alpha (alpha.local DC, DA-gated m8.s1) + secrets.alpha (SQL Server, the final target DB, m9.s1-s4). ws.alpha stays WORKGROUP -- it does NOT join alpha.local, so M7's local svc_deploy chain is unaffected.

c2.oscar._comment: M7 -- Mythic teamserver (Docker). Dual-homed oscar<->alpha: its beachhead implant's SOCKS proxy is the ONLY route into alpha. 6 GB/4 vCPU bump (2026-06-07) -- 2 vCPU/4 GB left Mythic's docker-compose (postgres + rabbitmq + nginx + multiple agent build containers + jupyter) cpu-saturated for hours after snapshot revert; double the vCPU lets compose come up in a few minutes, modest RAM bump avoids OOM during simultaneous container starts.

ws.alpha._comment: M7 -- pivot landing host. Git repo (m7.s3) + PowerShell history (m7.s4). WORKGROUP, local accounts (stays WORKGROUP even after M8's dc1.alpha lands -- do not join, it would break the M7 local svc_deploy chain).

gitlab.alpha._comment: M7 -- GitLab CE (Omnibus, Docker). Project infra/pipelines with masked CI/CD var DEPLOY_SECRET = m7.s5. M8 adds project apps/deploy-agent (C# build whose artifact the dc1.alpha DA poller deploys). 8 GB/4 vCPU (2026-06-07) -- the prior 6 GB allocation was tight when puma had 6 workers; the gitlab_cicd role now sets GITLAB_OMNIBUS_CONFIG to puma['worker_processes']=1 + worker_timeout=600 + prometheus_monitoring=false + gitlab_kas=false, which drops the resident set to ~3 GB and lets the VM run comfortably at 8 GB / 4 vCPU.

teamcity.alpha._comment: M7 -- lightweight CI: gitlab-runner (executes the manipulated pipeline) + a minimal TeamCity-style build-config stand-in.

dc1.alpha._comment: M8 -- alpha.local domain controller. Runs the Domain-Admin deploy poller (scheduled task) that pulls + executes the gitlab apps/deploy-agent build artifact. DA-only handoff file holds m8.s1 + the secrets.alpha SQL bridge cred.

secrets.alpha._comment: M9 -- the final target database. SQL Server 2022 Express, alpha.local-joined, VaultDb with the layered stored-proc injection chain (m9.s1-s4); dbo.TargetSecrets is the range objective.
